# BIG STORY · RED RENTAL

> RED Komodo X 6K cinema camera rental in Dubai. Below-market rates, certified RED specialist on set, free delivery within Dubai. Full production kits from AED 900/day. Netflix-approved.

BIG STORY · RED RENTAL is a Dubai, UAE cinema camera rental service specialising in the RED Komodo X 6K — a Netflix-approved camera with a Super35 global-shutter sensor, 16+ stops of dynamic range and REDCODE RAW. Three rental tiers are offered: a camera body-only kit (AED 900/day), a Cinema Master Kit that adds the DZOFILM Arles T1.4 cine prime lens set, grip, monitoring and wireless follow focus (AED 1,400/day), and a Flagship Full Bundle that delivers a complete film set — camera, lenses, Aputure/Nanlite lighting, a Zoom F8n Pro audio rig and a certified RED specialist (AED 1,800/day). All equipment is delivered and set up by a dedicated transport van — there is no client pickup. Delivery is free anywhere in Dubai; other emirates are served for a transport fee. Current rates are launch pricing offered to a limited number of productions in exchange for permission to document the shoot for the BIG STORY portfolio; rates move to standard market pricing once the calendar fills. Payment is by bank transfer only, with no commission fees. Contact: +971 52 841 8108 · hi@filmwithbigstory.com · Instagram @bigstory_red_rentals.

## Packages
- [RED Camera Brain Only — AED 900/day](https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/#packages): RED Komodo X 6K body, RED 7" LCD monitor, 2× 1TB CFexpress, V-Lock I/O module, 2× 98Wh batteries, free Dubai delivery. For crews with their own lenses and lighting.
- [RED Cinema Master Kit — AED 1,400/day](https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/#packages): Everything in the brain kit plus the DZOFILM Arles T1.4 5-lens cine prime set (25/35/50/75/100mm), PL→RF adapters, Tilta Mirage ND filters, Manfrotto tripod, stabilizer vest, SmallHD & Feelworld monitors, Teradek Bolt 6, Tilta Nucleus-M wireless follow focus.
- [RED Flagship Full Bundle — AED 1,800/day](https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/#packages): The complete film set — Master Kit plus 2× Aputure 600D Pro, Nanlite Pavotube RGB tubes, C-stands and modifiers, Zoom F8n Pro + Deity TC-1 + Sennheiser/Rode audio rig, and a certified RED camera specialist on set all day.
- [Certified RED Camera Specialist — AED 900/day](https://red.filmwithbigstory.com/#specialist): RED Komodo X certified operator handling setup, rigging, focus pulling, on-set technical support and teardown. Included with the Flagship bundle; add-on for any other package. Market rate elsewhere is AED 1,500/day.

## Service Areas
- Dubai — free delivery and pickup, equipment set up on arrival
- Abu Dhabi — delivery from AED 200
- Sharjah — delivery from AED 200
- Ras Al Khaimah (RAK) — delivery from AED 200
- Ajman — delivery from AED 200
- Al Ain — delivery from AED 200
- Fujairah — delivery from AED 200

## How To Book
1. Pick your dates and package in the online booking form, selecting a transport zone per shoot day.
2. Send the order via WhatsApp (+971 52 841 8108) — availability is confirmed within a few hours.
3. Transfer the rental amount by bank transfer to lock in the booking; the specialist arrives on the day with the full kit assembled and calibrated.
